title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-516)
description: On May 27, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE)  versions prior to 19.0.1, 18.11.4, 18.10.7
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE)  versions prior to 19.0.1, 18.11.4, 18.10.7
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
